meta.title: Brendon Smith — Creative Engineer
meta.description: Crafting immersive digital experiences at the intersection of AI, art & engineering

hero.subtitle: Crafting immersive digital experiences at the intersection of AI, art & engineering — from AI-powered XR platforms to FDA-approved therapeutics.
hero.subtitleShort: Crafting immersive digital experiences at the intersection of AI, art & engineering.
hero.subtitleExtended: Crafting immersive digital experiences at the intersection of AI, art & engineering — from AI-powered XR platforms to FDA-approved therapeutics & holographic retail.

about.label: About
about.title: Engineering the future of digital
about.titleAlt: Engineering the future of digital interaction
about.bio1: I'm a creative engineer in the SF Bay Area with 10+ years across AI, media, gaming, biomedical, and immersive tech. I specialize in React, Three.js, WebXR, Babylon.js, and AI-driven development with LangChain, OpenAI, and Anthropic APIs.
about.bio1Extended: I'm a creative engineer in the SF Bay Area with 15+ years across AI, media, gaming, biomedical, holographic retail, and immersive tech. I specialize in React, Three.js, WebXR, Babylon.js, Unity, and AI-driven development with LangChain, OpenAI, Anthropic, and custom AI agents.
about.bio1Alt: I'm a creative engineer in the SF Bay Area with 10+ years across AI, media, gaming, biomedical, and immersive tech. I specialize in React, Three.js, WebXR, and AI development with LangChain, OpenAI, and Anthropic.
about.bio2: From building m{ai}geXR, an AI platform generating 3D/XR from natural language, to the first FDA-approved digital therapeutic — I thrive where AI, creativity, and code converge.
about.bio2Extended: From building m{ai}geXR, an AI platform generating immersive 3D/XR experiences from natural language, to pioneering the first FDA-approved digital therapeutic for ADHD, to creating holographic retail experiences for Microsoft — I thrive at the convergence of AI, immersive technology, creativity, and code.

items.company: Independent App Development - Freelance — Private Clients, Microsoft, Rock Paper Reality
items.description: Holographic retail for Microsoft, AR campaigns with 8th Wall, React-Native and Shopify apps. Created Vibe coding 3D scene generator -> m{ai}geXR that has native mobile support on iOS and Android.
Building microservices and applications with React, GraphQL, and MongoDB. Worked on enterprise software specifically the no-code Library Management.
items.descriptionAlt: Building AI-powered microservices and applications with React, GraphQL, and MongoDB. Worked on enterprise software specifically the no-code Library Management.

items.description: Led loyalty platform front-end, data-driven UI optimization.
items.descriptionExtended: Led front-end architecture and development for the loyalty platform, driving data-driven UI optimization through A/B testing and analytics to boost in-game booster sales at scale.

items.description: Helped Pioneer ADHD INsights FDA-approved digital therapeutic.
items.descriptionExtended: Pioneered development of EndeavorRx (formerly EVO/ADHD Insights), the first FDA-approved prescription digital therapeutic for ADHD, including HIPAA-compliant patient dashboards and cross-platform native mobile applications.

items.description: CBS All Access streaming, Big Brother Live Feeds for millions.
items.descriptionExtended: Built CBS All Access (now Paramount+), one of the first major streaming platforms, including live Big Brother feeds serving millions of concurrent users with real-time WebGL visualizations.
items.descriptionAlt: CBS All Access streaming for millions.

items.description: Full-stack development for startups and digital agencies, building web applications and interactive experiences.
items.descriptionExtended: Full-stack development for early-stage startups and digital agencies, building responsive web applications, interactive experiences, and rapid prototypes using emerging web technologies.

items.name: ADHD Insights and EndeavorRx
items.description: FDA-approved digital therapeutic for ADHD. HIPAA-compliant dashboards and native apps.
items.descriptionExtended: Pioneered EndeavorRx, the first FDA-approved prescription digital therapeutic for ADHD treatment. Built HIPAA-compliant patient dashboards, physician portals, and cross-platform native mobile applications serving thousands of patients.

items.name: Candy Crush Loyalty
items.description: Loyalty platform front-end — data-driven booster sales through A/B testing.
items.descriptionExtended: Led front-end architecture for King's loyalty platform, implementing data-driven UI optimization through sophisticated A/B testing frameworks that significantly increased in-game booster sales and player engagement at massive scale.
items.descriptionAlt: Loyalty platform — A/B testing at scale.

items.name: Holographic Retail
items.description: Holographic retail and immersive AR advertising with 8th Wall and Unity.
items.descriptionExtended: Created cutting-edge holographic retail experiences for Microsoft and immersive AR advertising campaigns using 8th Wall WebAR, Unity, and Three.js, blending physical and digital retail environments for Fortune 500 brands.
items.descriptionAlt: Holographic retail and AR with 8th Wall + Unity.

items.name: CBS All Access
items.description: One of the first major streaming platforms — Paramount+ foundations.
items.descriptionExtended: Built CBS All Access (now Paramount+), one of the first major subscription streaming platforms, including live Big Brother feeds with real-time WebGL visualizations serving millions of concurrent viewers.

opensource.label: Open Source
opensource.title: AI & XR Open Source
opensource.intro: Open source projects exploring the intersection of AI and immersive technologies.

items.name: m{ai}geXR
items.description: AI platform: natural language → 3D/XR. 5+ AI providers, 5+ frameworks, 3 platforms.
items.descriptionExtended: Revolutionary AI platform that transforms natural language into immersive 3D and XR experiences. Integrates 5+ AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Mistral, Groq), supports 5+ frameworks (Three.js, Babylon.js, A-Frame, React-Three-Fiber, PlayCanvas), and deploys to web, iOS, and Android with native mobile support.

items.name: NOVA64
items.taglineExtended: N64-era fantasy console for the browser
items.description: N64/PS1-era 3D games in browser. GPU engine, voxels, physics, 20+ demos.
items.descriptionExtended: Fantasy console bringing N64/PS1-era 3D gaming to the browser with a custom GPU-accelerated rendering engine, voxel support, physics simulation, and 20+ playable demos ranging from racing to RPGs to puzzle games.

items.name: react-babylonjs
items.description: Declarative React renderer for Babylon.js 3D engine.
items.descriptionExtended: Declarative React renderer for Babylon.js 3D engine, enabling developers to build immersive 3D experiences using familiar React patterns and components with full TypeScript support and hooks integration.

editions.vaporwave: Vaporwave Edition — Flying Through Digital Dreams
